{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "IT System Administrator",
  "description": "Design Union is a real estate development group with divisions in Building design, construction, real estate development and hospitality.&nbsp;

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT System Administrator
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	Management of Information Technology Infrastructure, coordinating and supervising all activities as the first point of contact, for all Systems configuration, Installation and Maintenance (Hardware Support, Hardware Maintenance, Networking) in all Company Office facilities and Buildings.
	Management of Communication / telecommunications and Application Services (Software deployment and Support in terms of core application, operating systems, business systems implementation) in all Company Office facilities and Buildings.
	Safeguard the Company records by ensuring Data Protection through prompt Back up of data in all Company Office facilities and Buildings.
	Implementation of an Information Technology Business Continuity Plan and handling all matters relating to Emergency management and Back up operations, to facilitate continuity of business operations in the event of a disruption of operations.
	Oversee the Installation of Security Camera and maintenance in all Company Office facilities and Buildings.


Educational Qualification and Experience


	BSc (1st Class or 2nd Class) Degree in Computer Science, Management Information Systems, Computer Engineering or any other related Social Sciences plus certification in Computer courses
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar position


Skills/Abilities:


	Good oral and written communication skills.
	Good team player.
	Good interpersonal and people management skills.
	Excellent Negotiating skills
	Familiarity across the IT space and administrative process
	Strong sense of professionalism, integrity, sound judgment and tact
	Ability to maintain confidentiality.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr@designunion.com using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",

  "validThrough": "2026-06-21",

IT System Administrator Job at Design Union Limited




        
    

        
        Design Union is a real estate development group with divisions in Building design, construction, real estate development and hospitality. 

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: IT System Administrator
Job Location: Lekki, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Management of Information Technology Infrastructure, coordinating and supervising all activities as the first point of contact, for all Systems configuration, Installation and Maintenance (Hardware Support, Hardware Maintenance, Networking) in all Company Office facilities and Buildings.
	Management of Communication / telecommunications and Application Services (Software deployment and Support in terms of core application, operating systems, business systems implementation) in all Company Office facilities and Buildings.
	Safeguard the Company records by ensuring Data Protection through prompt Back up of data in all Company Office facilities and Buildings.
	Implementation of an Information Technology Business Continuity Plan and handling all matters relating to Emergency management and Back up operations, to facilitate continuity of business operations in the event of a disruption of operations.
	Oversee the Installation of Security Camera and maintenance in all Company Office facilities and Buildings.


Educational Qualification and Experience


	BSc (1st Class or 2nd Class) Degree in Computer Science, Management Information Systems, Computer Engineering or any other related Social Sciences plus certification in Computer courses
	Minimum of 3 years of experience in a similar position


Skills/Abilities:


	Good oral and written communication skills.
	Good team player.
	Good interpersonal and people management skills.
	Excellent Negotiating skills
	Familiarity across the IT space and administrative process
	Strong sense of professionalism, integrity, sound judgment and tact
	Ability to maintain confidentiality.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Sales Representative",
  "description": "HTSF Global Nigeria Limited is a mission-driven organization focused on sustainable agriculture, agribusiness development, and impact-driven enterprise solutions aligned with global development goals.

Founded on the vision of bridging the gap in accessing quality inputs, HTSF Global has established itself as a leader in the Nigerian Agricultural landscape, exemplified by its integrated farm operations and expansion into ecommerce retail andlogistics. Our work spans farming operations, ecommerce, training programs, logistics and structured business growth initiatives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative
Job Location: Ile Ife, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are recruiting a proactive and results-driven Sales Representative with a strong agricultural background to drive sales growth, customer acquisition, and market expansion.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new sales opportunities
	Maintain strong relationships with customers and distributors
	Promote and sell/upsell/resell company products and services
	Meet assigned sales targets and performance goals
	Conduct market surveys and provide customer feedback
	Prepare sales reports and activity updates


Requirements &amp; Qualifications


	Minimum of HND/B.Sc. in Agribusiness, Agricultural Economics, Marketing, Business Administration or related discipline
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in sales, marketing, or business development
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work with minimal supervision and deliver results
	Good understanding of&nbsp; agricultural products and markets
	Proficiency in basic computer applications.


Method of Application

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: htsfarmshumanresources@gmail.com using &quot;Sales Representative &ndash; HTSPlus.ng&quot; as the subject of the mail.",

Sales Representative Job at HTSF Global Nigeria Limited




        
    

        
        HTSF Global Nigeria Limited is a mission-driven organization focused on sustainable agriculture, agribusiness development, and impact-driven enterprise solutions aligned with global development goals.

Founded on the vision of bridging the gap in accessing quality inputs, HTSF Global has established itself as a leader in the Nigerian Agricultural landscape, exemplified by its integrated farm operations and expansion into ecommerce retail andlogistics. Our work spans farming operations, ecommerce, training programs, logistics and structured business growth initiatives.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Sales Representative
Job Location: Ile Ife, Osun
Employment Type: Full-time
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



Job Summary


	We are recruiting a proactive and results-driven Sales Representative with a strong agricultural background to drive sales growth, customer acquisition, and market expansion.


Key Responsibilities


	Identify and develop new sales opportunities
	Maintain strong relationships with customers and distributors
	Promote and sell/upsell/resell company products and services
	Meet assigned sales targets and performance goals
	Conduct market surveys and provide customer feedback
	Prepare sales reports and activity updates


Requirements & Qualifications


	Minimum of HND/B.Sc. in Agribusiness, Agricultural Economics, Marketing, Business Administration or related discipline
	Minimum of 2 years of experience in sales, marketing, or business development
	Strong communication, negotiation, and interpersonal skills
	Ability to work with minimal supervision and deliver results
	Good understanding of  agricultural products and markets
	Proficiency in basic computer applications.


Method of Application

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using "Sales Representative – HTSPlus.ng" as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Manager",
  "description": "Aggregon Foods is a fast food services company dedicated to providing quality and affordable meals to the general public,offering a variety of both continental and local dishes, prepared by professional chefs under hygienic conditions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Manager
Job Location: Ajah (Badore), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a proactive and reliableAssistant Managerto support daily operations in our fast food restaurant.
	The Assistant Manager will help oversee staff performance, customer satisfaction, inventory, and compliance with operational standards.
	This role is vital in ensuring smooth, efficient, and profitable restaurant operations.


Responsibilities


	Assist the Outlet Manager in the day-to-day running of the restaurant.
	Supervise staff to ensure excellent customer service and adherence to company standards.
	Train, coach, and motivate team members to achieve performance targets.
	Monitor food preparation and presentation to maintain quality and hygiene standards.
	Handle customer complaints and resolve issues professionally and promptly.
	Assist with scheduling, shift planning, and attendance management.
	Enforce health, safety, and sanitation guidelines.
	Maintain a clean and organized dining and kitchen environment.
	Support sales goals through upselling and promotions.
	Generate and submit reports on sales, expenses, and staff performance.
	Stand in for the Outlet Manager when needed.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND/HND/BSc in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related field.
	2 &ndash; 5 years of experience in a supervisory or managerial role in a fast food or hospitality environment.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Good knowledge of food safety, hygiene, and quality standards.
	Ability to manage and motivate a team effectively.
	Strong problem-solving skills and customer service orientation.
	Good organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Willingness to work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays.


Salary
N185,000 - N200,000 per month.&nbsp;

Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to Hannah.onamade@aggregonsfoodng.com using &quot;Assistant Manager&rdquo; as the subject of the email.

Note


	No accommodation provided
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Assistant Manager Job at Aggregon Foods




        
    

        
        Aggregon Foods is a fast food services company dedicated to providing quality and affordable meals to the general public,offering a variety of both continental and local dishes, prepared by professional chefs under hygienic conditions.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Manager
Job Location: Ajah (Badore), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are looking for a proactive and reliableAssistant Managerto support daily operations in our fast food restaurant.
	The Assistant Manager will help oversee staff performance, customer satisfaction, inventory, and compliance with operational standards.
	This role is vital in ensuring smooth, efficient, and profitable restaurant operations.


Responsibilities


	Assist the Outlet Manager in the day-to-day running of the restaurant.
	Supervise staff to ensure excellent customer service and adherence to company standards.
	Train, coach, and motivate team members to achieve performance targets.
	Monitor food preparation and presentation to maintain quality and hygiene standards.
	Handle customer complaints and resolve issues professionally and promptly.
	Assist with scheduling, shift planning, and attendance management.
	Enforce health, safety, and sanitation guidelines.
	Maintain a clean and organized dining and kitchen environment.
	Support sales goals through upselling and promotions.
	Generate and submit reports on sales, expenses, and staff performance.
	Stand in for the Outlet Manager when needed.


Requirements


	Minimum of OND/HND/BSc in Hospitality Management, Business Administration, or related field.
	2 – 5 years of experience in a supervisory or managerial role in a fast food or hospitality environment.
	Strong leadership, communication, and interpersonal skills.
	Good knowledge of food safety, hygiene, and quality standards.
	Ability to manage and motivate a team effectively.
	Strong problem-solving skills and customer service orientation.
	Good organizational and multitasking abilities.
	Willingness to work flexible hours, including weekends and holidays.


Salary
N185,000 - N200,000 per month. 

Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to [email protected] using "Assistant Manager” as the subject of the email.

Note


	No accommodation provided
	Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Office Administrator",
  "description": "Development Africa is a humanitarian international non-governmental organization working across Nigeria to foster sustainable development in various sectors, with a primary focus on healthcare and education.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Administrator

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full time

Job Summary


	We are seeking an Office Administrator responsible for supporting the day-to-day administrative and operational activities of the hospital.
	The role involves coordinating office operations, managing records and documentation, supporting internal departments, monitoring supplies and facilities, and ensuring smooth administrative processes within the hospital.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate daily office administrative activities.
	Maintain proper filing systems and office documentation.
	Prepare official letters, reports, memos, and internal correspondence.
	Monitor office supply usage and initiate replenishment requests.
	Ensure proper use and maintenance of office equipment and administrative spaces.
	Maintain and update administrative records and reports.
	Ensure departmental documents are properly filed and stored.
	Support document tracking, approvals, and record retrieval.
	Maintain confidentiality of hospital and staff information.
	Support smooth coordination between hospital departments.
	Assist with scheduling meetings, trainings, and administrative activities.
	Follow up on administrative requests and operational issues.
	Ensure compliance with administrative procedures and organizational policies.
	Monitor cleanliness and functionality of office areas.
	Follow up on maintenance and repair requests.
	Coordinate administrative support for hospital programs and activities.
	Liaise with vendors and service providers when required.
	Prepare periodic administrative reports.
	Monitor administrative gaps and escalate concerns when necessary.
	Ensure compliance with hospital administrative standards and procedures.


Requirements


	HND or Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Public Administration, Management, or related field.
	2&ndash;3 years of administrative experience, preferably in a hospital or healthcare setting.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office applications.
	Strong organizational and documentation skills.

Office Administrator Job at Development Africa




        
    

        
        Development Africa is a humanitarian international non-governmental organization working across Nigeria to foster sustainable development in various sectors, with a primary focus on healthcare and education.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Office Administrator

Job Location: Lekki Phase 1, Lagos
Employment Type: Full time

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	We are seeking an Office Administrator responsible for supporting the day-to-day administrative and operational activities of the hospital.
	The role involves coordinating office operations, managing records and documentation, supporting internal departments, monitoring supplies and facilities, and ensuring smooth administrative processes within the hospital.


Key Responsibilities


	Coordinate daily office administrative activities.
	Maintain proper filing systems and office documentation.
	Prepare official letters, reports, memos, and internal correspondence.
	Monitor office supply usage and initiate replenishment requests.
	Ensure proper use and maintenance of office equipment and administrative spaces.
	Maintain and update administrative records and reports.
	Ensure departmental documents are properly filed and stored.
	Support document tracking, approvals, and record retrieval.
	Maintain confidentiality of hospital and staff information.
	Support smooth coordination between hospital departments.
	Assist with scheduling meetings, trainings, and administrative activities.
	Follow up on administrative requests and operational issues.
	Ensure compliance with administrative procedures and organizational policies.
	Monitor cleanliness and functionality of office areas.
	Follow up on maintenance and repair requests.
	Coordinate administrative support for hospital programs and activities.
	Liaise with vendors and service providers when required.
	Prepare periodic administrative reports.
	Monitor administrative gaps and escalate concerns when necessary.
	Ensure compliance with hospital administrative standards and procedures.


Requirements


	HND or Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Public Administration, Management, or related field.
	2–3 years of administrative experience, preferably in a hospital or healthcare setting.
	Good knowledge of Microsoft Office applications.
	Strong organizational and documentation skills.


Note: Kindly note that we are seeking candidates who are available to resume immediately or within a short notice period.

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Graphic Designer",
  "description": "Shengway Global Merchant Ltd. is a retail trading company, operating with the brand name &ldquo;MINISO&rdquo;. MINISO is a fast-growing international retail chain brand with over 6000 stores across Europe, Asia, Africa, America and Oceania and has established strategic partnerships with over 100 countries. MINISO focuses on fashionable and relaxed high-quality lifestyle products including electronics, personal care and beauty, home essentials, sports, gifts, toys, stationery, seasonal products, amongst many others, which covers every aspect of life. In addition to the quality and creativity, MINISO values the shopping experience of its customers and dedicates itself to being a fashionable, close-to-life brand that provides customers with a better shopping experience. Shengway Global Merchant Ltd (Miniso Nigeria) has several stores in the country

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphic Designer
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a smart and very creative individual to join our team to enhance the business of the company. To be successful in this role, you should be capable of delivering brilliant creative ideas, and show amazing attention to detail.


Responsibilities


	Utilize graphic design software:Develop designs using tools like Photoshop, InDesign, and Adobe Creative Suite.
	Incorporate typography and color theory: Use fonts, design principles, and color schemes to enhance the appeal of marketing materials.
	Maintain brand guidelines:Ensure consistency across all visual designs to build a strong brand identity.
	Develop visual concepts:Brainstorm and execute ideas that align with the company&rsquo;s goals and target audience.
	Creating designs for various mediums for marketing materials, social media, website etc. Tailor visuals for digital platforms, print, and multimedia projects.
	Meet deadlines:Manage time effectively to deliver high-quality designs on schedule.
	Stay updated on design trends:Research industry trends to integrate modern and innovative styles into projects.
	Collaborate with team members:Work closely with marketing teams to ensure cohesive visual concepts.


Qualifications


	A Bachelor&rsquo;s degree or higher national diploma in graphic design, fine arts, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience as a graphic designer or in related field.
	Relevant professional qualification or certification is a plus.
	Demonstrated expertise in graphic designs through a strong portfolio with high-quality designs.


Required Skills:


	Technical proficiency:Skilled in design software, including but not limited to Photoshop, InDesign, and Adobe Creative Suite.
	Communication skills.:Ability to clearly articulate ideas and collaborate with stakeholders and team members.
	Graphic design skills:Proficiency in typography, color theory, and design principles to create impactful visuals.
	Time management skills: Efficiently manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Adaptability:Flexibility to adjust designs based on feedback and evolving project requirements.
	Problem-solving skills:Creative ability to overcome design challenges and deliver effective solutions.
	Knowledge of design trends:Awareness of industry trends and the ability to integrate them into projects.
	A strong eye for and expertise in visual composition, to craft compelling visual concepts.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: hr_ng@miniso.com.ng using the Job Position as the subject of the email.",
  "datePosted": "2026-05-13",
  "validThrough": "2026-06-14",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

Graphic Designer Job at Shengway Global Merchant Ltd




        
    

        
        
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    

Shengway Global Merchant Ltd. is a retail trading company, operating with the brand name “MINISO”. MINISO is a fast-growing international retail chain brand with over 6000 stores across Europe, Asia, Africa, America and Oceania and has established strategic partnerships with over 100 countries. MINISO focuses on fashionable and relaxed high-quality lifestyle products including electronics, personal care and beauty, home essentials, sports, gifts, toys, stationery, seasonal products, amongst many others, which covers every aspect of life. In addition to the quality and creativity, MINISO values the shopping experience of its customers and dedicates itself to being a fashionable, close-to-life brand that provides customers with a better shopping experience. Shengway Global Merchant Ltd (Miniso Nigeria) has several stores in the country

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Graphic Designer
Job Location: Victoria Island, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	We are looking for a smart and very creative individual to join our team to enhance the business of the company. To be successful in this role, you should be capable of delivering brilliant creative ideas, and show amazing attention to detail.


Responsibilities


	Utilize graphic design software:Develop designs using tools like Photoshop, InDesign, and Adobe Creative Suite.
	Incorporate typography and color theory: Use fonts, design principles, and color schemes to enhance the appeal of marketing materials.
	Maintain brand guidelines:Ensure consistency across all visual designs to build a strong brand identity.
	Develop visual concepts:Brainstorm and execute ideas that align with the company’s goals and target audience.
	Creating designs for various mediums for marketing materials, social media, website etc. Tailor visuals for digital platforms, print, and multimedia projects.
	Meet deadlines:Manage time effectively to deliver high-quality designs on schedule.
	Stay updated on design trends:Research industry trends to integrate modern and innovative styles into projects.
	Collaborate with team members:Work closely with marketing teams to ensure cohesive visual concepts.


Qualifications


	A Bachelor’s degree or higher national diploma in graphic design, fine arts, or a related field.
	Minimum of 3 years of experience as a graphic designer or in related field.
	Relevant professional qualification or certification is a plus.
	Demonstrated expertise in graphic designs through a strong portfolio with high-quality designs.


Required Skills:


	Technical proficiency:Skilled in design software, including but not limited to Photoshop, InDesign, and Adobe Creative Suite.
	Communication skills.:Ability to clearly articulate ideas and collaborate with stakeholders and team members.
	Graphic design skills:Proficiency in typography, color theory, and design principles to create impactful visuals.
	Time management skills: Efficiently manage multiple projects and meet deadlines in a fast-paced environment.
	Adaptability:Flexibility to adjust designs based on feedback and evolving project requirements.
	Problem-solving skills:Creative ability to overcome design challenges and deliver effective solutions.
	Knowledge of design trends:Awareness of industry trends and the ability to integrate them into projects.
	A strong eye for and expertise in visual composition, to craft compelling visual concepts.


Method of Application 

Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the
